title: Cut & Paste
excerpt: So delighted to be showing you my newest collection, which will be available at the end of August/beginning of September. It's something that's been in the works since January. I can hardly believe that it's the 5th time collaborating with…
body:
So delighted to be showing you my newest collection, which will be available at the end of August/beginning of September. It's something that's been in the works since January. I can hardly believe that it's the 5th time collaborating with American Crafts. And we're so happy to be introducing 2 new embroidery stencil kits along with some other fun new products. Here's a little peek at a project I made.

Celebrate everyday moments with Cut & Paste, a collage-inspired, vintage collection. Delightful, eclectic basics can be mixed and matched for countless creative possibilities. Neutral colors provide the backdrop for pops of emerald green, honeysuckle pink, and sunshine yellow. This colorful collection is filled with geometric shapes and charming graphics, including hearts, arrows, cameras and clocks. Find joy in the everyday with Cut & Paste.

This collection contains 22 double-sided patterned papers, two specialty papers, coordinating Thickers, stickers, and two beautifully designed embroidery stencil kits. New favorites include stitched vellum pockets and die-cut, dimensional paper. Add a bit of color with Cut & Paste!

Next week I'll be in Vegas at CHA or as it's being called the Create-n-Connect Conference & Tradeshow. Please stop by the American Crafts booth to say hi and check out the line. For those of you who can't make it to see the collection in person, American Crafts is giving away a prize pack on their blog!
